business.name: Madina Electrical & Plumbing Store
business.tagline: Your Local Trade Supplier in Manchester

contact.address: Unit 3, 431 Cheetham Hill Rd, Cheetham Hill, Manchester M8 0PF

sample_reviews.author: Ahmed R.
sample_reviews.text: Great little trade store with a solid range of plumbing and electrical supplies. Staff are helpful and prices are competitive. Will definitely return.

sample_reviews.author: David M.
sample_reviews.text: Handy location on Cheetham Hill Road. Had everything I needed for a bathroom refit in stock. Quick and easy service, no fuss.

sample_reviews.author: Tariq S.
sample_reviews.text: My go-to supplier for trade materials in North Manchester. Good stock, fair prices and friendly staff who know their products.

brand.usp: Madina Electrical & Plumbing Store is North Manchester's dedicated trade and retail supplier, offering a wide range of plumbing and electrical materials under one roof at competitive prices.
brand.hero_headline: Trade Supplies You Can Trust in Manchester
brand.about_paragraph: At Madina Electrical & Plumbing Store, we supply tradespeople and homeowners across Manchester with everything they need for plumbing, heating, and electrical projects. Based on Cheetham Hill Road, we stock a wide range of quality materials at trade-friendly prices. Whether you're a sole trader, contractor, or DIY enthusiast, we're here to help you get the job done right.
